title: apocalypse_end
description: Nether's fallen legacy—hunt relics, challenge the Primordial One.
body:
Apocalypse Ends
 
Embark on an epic journey through the decayed Nether Legacy. In this massive Minecraft adventure mode, forge powerful relics, challenge ancient rituals, and confront the ultimate source of the world's decline.
 
Key Features:
 
- Forge Legendary Tools: Combine amethyst, gold ingots and diamonds to craft Amethyst Gold Diamonds, then forge the Amethyst Spirit Gold Anvil and Amethyst Spirit Gold Hammer.
​
- Fragments of Divinity: Defeat the Wither to obtain Nether Stars, then forge them into Fragments of Divinity with your tools.
​
- Ancient Rituals: Build an altar and perform the Rewind Ritual to summon the Shattered Will Boss, and claim the Broken Divine Light as a reward.
​
- Apocalypse Process: Unleash the Apocalypse Ritual to trigger the "Apocalypse Process", a world-altering event that reshapes the landscape and its inhabitants.
​
- Restore the Light: Explore the transformed world, find Origin Emblems, absorb their power, and restore the Broken Divine Light into the Ashen Broken Divine Light.
​
- Confront the Origin: Collect powerful gear from corrupted creatures, defeat the Ascended Apostles, and summon the final boss—Origin: Beginning and End.
​
- Forge the Ultimate Artifact: With the apocalypse halted, combine your most powerful items to craft the Divine Ring of Beginning and End.
